info.title: Golemio API
info.description:
Toto je dokumentace REST API projektu pra�sk� datov� platformy Golemio.

Ve�ker� dotazy pros�m smerujte na golemio@operatorict.cz.

Dokumentace je v anglick�m jazyce. V�ce informac� o projektu naleznete na www.golemio.cz.

Description

This documentation covers the RESTful API of the Golemio Prague Data Platform project, specifically detailing the Output Gateway API.

Support is accessible via golemio@operatorict.cz.

For more information about Golemio, please visit the website www.golemio.cz.

Golemio API documentation:

  • ?? Main Golemio API
  • Open Data Golemio API
  • Golemio Input Gateway API
  • Public Transport Golemio API
  • Public Transport Golemio Input Gateway API

    • General info

    Authorization

    Generate your token at api.golemio.cz/api-keys.

    Use the token as the value of the X-Access-Token header.

    Usage

    Pagination

    The API returns a maximum of 10,000 objects/rows per request. You can specify a lower number by adding the ?limit URL parameter.

    This limit may vary depending on the specific route; please refer to the description of parameters for each route. To retrieve more data, use multiple requests with the ?limit&offset parameters. Refer to the examples below.

    Requests rate

    By default, each API key has a rate limit of 20 requests per 8 seconds.

    Compression

    By default, the Content-Encoding header is set to gzip (if requested). If the raw response is less than 1 KB, the data is returned uncompressed, and the Content-Encoding header is not set.

    Open Data

    This badge indicates that the data is available for public use as Open Data.

get.summary: Get vector tile data for a specific map tile
get.description:
Returns a Mapbox Vector Tile (MVT) containing features from the specified table and geometry column.
Useful for rendering geospatial data on interactive maps at the specified zoom, x, and y tile coordinates.

parameters.name: z
parameters.description: Zoom level of the tile.

parameters.name: x
parameters.description: X coordinate of the tile.

parameters.name: y
parameters.description: Y coordinate of the tile.

parameters.name: table
parameters.description: Fully qualified table name (e.g. `schema.table`) to fetch data from.

parameters.name: geometry
parameters.description: Name of the geometry column in the table.

parameters.name: attributes
parameters.description: List of attribute columns to include in the tile features.

parameters.name: maxZoom
parameters.description: Maximum zoom level at which data from this table should be rendered.

parameters.name: radius
parameters.description: Buffer radius in pixels around the tile to include features near edges.

parameters.name: clusterPoint
parameters.description: Name of the column that will be used for clustering, use only if it differs from geometry. (e.g. calculating clustering for polygons can take longer and result in bigger clusters.)

parameters.name: colorAttribute
parameters.description: Name of the column to use for coloring features

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: stringified json for filter parameters

Cache-Control.description: Cache control directive for caching proxies.

Content-Type.description: The MIME type of the response.

get.description: Ensure the provided data conforms to the database schema requirements.

parameters.name: table
parameters.description: Fully qualified table name (e.g. `schema.table`) to fetch data from.

parameters.name: geometry
parameters.description: Name of the geometry column in the table.

parameters.name: attributes
parameters.description: List of attribute columns to include in the tile features.

parameters.name: clusterPoint
parameters.description: Name of the column that will be used for clustering, use only if it differs from geometry. (e.g. calculating clustering for polygons can take longer and result in bigger clusters.)

parameters.name: colorAttribute
parameters.description: Name of the column to use for coloring features

Cache-Control.description: Cache control directive for caching proxies.

get.summary: Get a list of parking locations within the region of interest with filtering options

parameters.name: primarySource
parameters.description: Filter by data source (note that `osm` is a secondary source, not a primary source). Use with square brackets `primarySource[]`. When no filter is used, all parking locations from all primary sources are included along with non-overlapping parking locations from all secondary sources (`osm`). Similarly, when a filter with both primary and secondary sources is used, all parking locations from the specified primary sources are included along with non-overlapping parking locations from the specified secondary sources. When a filter with only a single source is used, all parking locations from the specified source are included regardless of whether the source is primary or secondary.

parameters.name: boundingBox
parameters.description: Filter by bounding box in format "topLeft.lat,topLeft.lon,bottomRight.lat,bottomRight.lon", polygons that fit only partially to selected bounding box are included

parameters.name: validFrom
parameters.description: Filter by valid from date

parameters.name: openingHoursValidFrom
parameters.description: Filter opening hours by valid from date

parameters.name: openingHoursValidTo
parameters.description: Filter opening hours by valid to date

parameters.name: accessDedicatedTo
parameters.description: Experimental: Filter by access combinations to specific spaces in parking. Return only strictly matched parking by access to parking spaces

parameters.name: parkingPolicy
parameters.description: Filter by parking policy. For multiple values use with square brackets `parkingPolicy[]`

parameters.name: minutesBefore
parameters.description: Filter by time conditions based on last data update. By maximal minutes before last update.

parameters.name: updatedSince
parameters.description: Filter by time conditions based on last data update. Date has to be in ISO8601 format. Cannot be used together with minutesBefore.

parameters.name: activeOnly
parameters.description: If true, filter out locations that did not appear in latest source data.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of results to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of results to skip for pagination

Cache-Control.description: Cache control directive for caching proxies

get.summary: Get a list of parking machines within the region of interest with filtering options. Results are sorted by id.

parameters.name: primarySource
parameters.description: Filter by primary source. Use with square brackets `primarySource[]`

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter by type. Use with square brackets `type[]`

parameters.name: boundingBox
parameters.description: Filter by bounding box in format "topLeft.lat,topLeft.lon,bottomRight.lat,bottomRight.lon", polygons that fit only partially to selected bounding box are included

parameters.name: codeMask
parameters.description:
Filter by code mask using substring match and "%" wildcard (partial match). (If used directly in postman or browser, "%" needs to be encoded as "%25".
Examples:
- `query` matches substring in codes
- `start%` matches codes starting with "start"
- `%end` matches codes ending with "end"
- `%middle%` matches codes containing "middle" anywhere

parameters.name: validFrom
parameters.description: Filter by valid from date

parameters.name: activeOnly
parameters.description: If true, filter out parking machines that did not appear in latest source data.

get.description:
**Trash type**
| 1 | Barevn� sklo | Tinted glass |
| 2 | Elektrozar�zen� | Electric waste |
| 3 | Kovy | Metals |
| 4 | N�pojov� kart�ny | Beverage cartons |
| 5 | Pap�r | Paper |
| 6 | Plast | Plastics |
| 7 | Cir� sklo | Clear glass |
| 8 | Jedl� tuky a oleje | Edible fats and oils |
| 9 | Multikomoditn� sber | Multicommodity |

**Cleaning Frequency**
| Value | 1st digit - period duration | 2nd digit - frequency |
Example:
| `13` | `1` | `3` | 3 times per 1 week |
| `61` | `6` | `1` | Once per 6 weeks |
Code `99` stands for dynamic frequency.

AverageOccupancyWeek.description: The day of the week (0 - 6; Sunday is 0)

type.description: The type of geometry (GeoJSON Point, Polygon, MultiPolygon).

geometry.description: GeoJSON geometry of the parking location.

id.description: The identifier for the parking location.

primary_source.description: The primary source of the parking location. Assigned by us.

primary_source_id.description: The ID defined by the primary source. As in the source data.

name.description: The name of the parking location.

valid_from.description: The start date and time when the parking location is opened from. Or date of implementation.

centroid.description: The GeoJSON centroid of the parking location, centroid is always point in geometry.

last_updated_at.description: The date and time when info about the parking location was last checked and updated.

last_modified_at_source.description: The date and time when the parking location was last modified at the source. In case data source provides it.

security.description: Whether the parking location has security.

capacity.description: The capacity of the parking location.

parking_policy.description:
The parking policy of the parking location.
* `park_and_ride` - parking for transit users
* `kiss_and_ride` - short-term passenger drop-off
* `commercial` - paid parking for public
* `zone` - parking restricted by area (e.g., blue, violet, orange)
* `park_sharing` - shared parking spaces
* `customer_only` - exclusive for customers

email.description: The email of the parking location.

phone.description: The phone number of the parking location.

web_url.description: The website of the parking location.

filter.description: Specific marking of parking space (blue zone, A zone etc.).

parking_type.description:
The parking type of the parking location.
* `on_street` - parking on the street
* `underground` - subterranean parking facility
* `multi_storey` - multi-level parking garage
* `surface` - open-air parking lot
* `rooftop` - parking on building roof
* `other` - other type of parking

has_occupancy_info.description: True if average occupancy info calculated from measurements is available

type.description: The type of geometry (GeoJSON Point, Polygon, MultiPolygon).

geometry.description: GeoJSON geometry of the parking space.

id.description: The identifier for the parking space.

capacity.description: The capacity of the parking space.

access_dedicated_to.description:
Array of dedicated access types for the parking space, where empty array means no restriction = open for all vehicles:
* `disabled` - reserved for disabled individuals
* `charging` - intended for electric vehicle charging
* `parent` - designated for parents with children
* `delivery` - exclusively for delivery purposes
* `customer` -  exclusive for customers
* `resident` - reserved for residents
* `bus` - reserved for buses
* `designated` - specific purpose (e.g., school, embassy)
* `truck` - reserved for trucks
* `motorcycle` - for motorcycles only
* `RV` - reserved for recreational vehicles

type.description: The type of geometry (GeoJSON Point, Polygon, MultiPolygon).

geometry.description: GeoJSON geometry of the parking space.

primary_source.description: The primary source of the parking location. Assigned by us.

primary_source_id.description: The ID defined by the primary source. As in the source data.

last_updated.description: The date and time when the info about the occupancy measurement was last updated.

address_formatted.description: Formatted address of the parking location.

postal_code.description: Postal code of the parking location.

street_address.description: Street address of the parking location.

area.description: Area of the parking lot in square meters.

id.description: The UUID identifier for the tariff.

charge_bands.description: Array of Charge Band objects that represent tariff categories for different users. Items are sorted by charge_band_name.

primary_source.description: The primary source of the charge band.

primary_source_id.description: The ID defines by the primary source.

last_updated_at.description: The date and time when info about the tariff category was last checked and updated.

last_modified_at_source.description: The date and time when the tariff category was last modified at the source.

charges.description: Array of Charge objects. Items are sorted by charge_order_index.

free_of_charge.description: Free charging, no need to calculate the price from Charges.

payment_methods.description:
Payment methods for charging.
* `card_online` - payment through an online card transaction (e.g., on website)
* `card_offline` - payment using a card (using a parking machine, terminal etc.)
* `litacka` - payment via a PID L�tacka mobile app
* `cash` - payment with physical cash
* `coins_only` - payment using coins only
* `mobile_app` - payment through a dedicated mobile app (no PID L�tacka)
* `sms_payment` - payment made via SMS
* `apple_pay` - payment using Apple Pay
* `google_pay` - payment using Google Pay

payment_mode.description: Whether payment occurs prior to parking or after.

id.description: The UUID identifier for the charge.

periods_of_time.description: Array of Periods of Time objects.

start.description: Start time of the periods of time.

end.description: End time of the periods of time.

type.description: The type of geometry (GeoJSON Point, Polygon, MultiPolygon).

geometry.description: GeoJSON geometry of the parking machine.

id.description: ID of the parking machine. Formatted as primary_source-primary_source_id

primary_source.description: The primary source of the parking machine.

primary_source_id.description: The ID defined by the primary source.

machine_type.description:
The type of the parking machine.
  * `payment_machine` - a facility where payment can be made for parking; often equipped with payment options
  * `info_box` - an installation providing information and possibly a QR code, without payment capabilities.

valid_from.description: The start date when the parking machine is valid.

tariff_id.description: The UUID identifier for the tariff connected to the parking machine.

periods_of_time.description: Array of Periods of Time objects.

start.description: Start time of the periods of time.

end.description: End time of the periods of time.

disc_parking.description: Need to use a parking disc.

lpg/cng.description: LPG/CNG vehicles permitted to enter the parking.

bus.description: buses permitted to enter the parking.

truck.description: trucks permitted to enter the parking.

motorcycle.description: motorcycles permitted to enter the parking.

bicycle.description: bicycles permitted to enter the parking.

trailer.description: trailers permitted to enter the parking.

content.example: Popis: Asi 300 m od prodejny Lidl v Hornomecholupsk� ulici se na okraji louky rozkl�d� prvn� hri�te (43.A). Tvor� ho...

perex.example: Trasa je vhodn�m polodenn�m rodinn�m v�letem.

description.example: WC na hri�ti nebo v bezprostredn� bl�zkosti

location_note.example: Kdy� zaparkujete kolo do tohoto stojanu, tak nezaplat�te posledn�ch 30 min z j�zdy. Bohu�el, aktu�lne v tomto stojanu v�ak ��dn� kolo nen�.

regions.description: Array of regions in the system.

system_id.description: Identifier of the system associated with the region.

last_updated.description: Last time the data in the feed was updated in POSIX time.

ttl.description: Number of seconds before the data in the feed will be updated again (0 if the data should always be refreshed).

version.description: GBFS version number to which the feed conforms, according to the versioning framework (added in v1.1).

data.description: Response data in the form of name:value pairs.

GBFSJson.description: Auto-discovery file that links to all of the other files published by the system.

feeds.description: An array of all of the feeds that are published by the auto-discovery file. Each element in the array is an object with the keys below.

name.description: Key identifying the type of feed this is. The key must be the base file name defined in the spec for the corresponding feed type.

GBFSVersionsJson.description: Lists all feed endpoints published according to version sof the GBFS documentation. (added in v1.1)

versions.description: Contains one object, as defined below, for each of the available versions of a feed. The array must be sorted by increasing MAJOR and MINOR version number.

version.description: The semantic version of the feed in the form X.Y

url.description: URL of the corresponding gbfs.json endpoint

GBFSSystemInformationJson.description: Details including system operator, system location, year implemented, URL, contact info, time zone.

system_id.description: Identifier for this vehicle share system. This should be globally unique (even between different systems).

language.description: The language that will be used throughout the rest of the files. It must match the value in the gbfs.json file.

name.description: Name of the system to be displayed to customers.

url.description: The URL of the vehicle share system.

purchase_url.description: URL where a customer can purchase a membership.

start_date.description: Date that the system began operations.

phone_number.description: A single voice telephone number for the specified system that presents the telephone number as typical for the system's service area.

email.description: Email address actively monitored by the operator's customer service department.

feed_contact_email.description: A single contact email address for consumers of this feed to report technical issues (added in v1.1).

timezone.description: The time zone where the system is located.

license_id.description: REQUIRED if the dataset is provided under a standard license. An identifier for a standard license from the SPDX License List. Provide license_id rather than license_url if the license is included in the SPDX License List. See the GBFS wiki for a comparison of a subset of standard licenses. If the license_id and license_url fields are blank or omitted, this indicates that the feed is provided under the Creative Commons Universal Public Domain Dedication.

license_url.description: A fully qualified URL of a page that defines the license terms for the GBFS data for this system.

attribution_organization_name.description: If the feed license requires attribution, name of the organization to which attribution should be provided.

attribution_url.description: URL of the organization to which attribution should be provided.

rental_apps.description: Contains rental app information in the android and ios JSON objects (added in v1.1).

android.description: Contains rental app download and app discovery information for the Android platform. (added in v1.1)

store_uri.description: URI where the rental Android app can be downloaded from (added in v1.1).

discovery_uri.description: URI that can be used to discover if the rental Android app is installed on the device (added in v1.1).

ios.description: Contains rental information for the iOS platform (added in v1.1).

store_uri.description: URI where the rental iOS app can be downloaded from (added in v1.1).

discovery_uri.description: URI that can be used to discover if the rental iOS app is installed on the device (added in v1.1).

GBFSVehicleTypesJson.description: Describes the types of vehicles that System operator has available for rent (added in v2.1-RC).

vehicle_types.description: Array that contains one object per vehicle type in the system as defined below.

vehicle_type_id.description: Unique identifier of a vehicle type.

propulsion_type.description: The primary propulsion type of the vehicle.

max_range_meters.description: The furthest distance in meters that the vehicle can travel without recharging or refueling when it has the maximum amount of energy potential.

name.description: The public name of this vehicle type.

GBFSStationInformationJson.description: Details including system operator, system location, year implemented, URL, contact info, time zone.

short_name.description: Short name or other type of identifier.

cross_street.description: Cross street or landmark where the station is located.

region_id.description: Identifier of the region where the station is located.

post_code.description: Postal code where station is located.

rental_methods.description: Payment methods accepted at this station.

is_virtual_station.description: Is this station a location with or without physical infrastructure? (added in v2.1-RC)

station_area.description: A multipolygon that describes the area of a virtual station (added in v2.1-RC).

capacity.description: Number of total docking points installed at this station, both available and unavailable.

vehicle_capacity.description: An object where each key is a vehicle_type_id and the value is a number presenting the total number of vehicles of this type that can park within the station_area (added in v2.1-RC).

is_valet_station.description: Are valet services provided at this station? (added in v2.1-RC)

rental_uris.description: Contains rental uris for Android, iOS, and web in the android, ios, and web fields (added in v1.1).

android.description: URI that can be passed to an Android app with an intent (added in v1.1).

ios.description: URI that can be used on iOS to launch the rental app for this station (added in v1.1).

web.description: URL that can be used by a web browser to show more information about renting a vehicle at this station (added in v1.1).

vehicle_type_capacity.description: An object where each key is a vehicle_type_id and the value is a number representing the total docking points installed at this station for each vehicle type (added in v2.1-RC).

GBFSStationStatusJson.description: Describes the capacity and rental availability of the station

num_bikes_available.description: Number of vehicles of any type physically available for rental at the station.

vehicle_types_available.description: Array of objects displaying the total number of each vehicle type at the station (added in v2.1-RC).

vehicle_type_id.description: The vehicle_type_id of vehicle at the station (added in v2.1-RC).

count.description: A number representing the total amount of this vehicle type at the station (added in v2.1-RC).

num_bikes_disabled.description: Number of disabled vehicles of any type at the station.

num_docks_available.description: Number of functional docks physically at the station.

num_docks_disabled.description: Number of empty but disabled docks at the station.

is_installed.description: Is the station currently on the street?

is_renting.description: Is the station currently renting vehicles?

is_returning.description: Is the station accepting vehicle returns?

last_reported.description: The last time this station reported its status to the operator's backend in POSIX time.

vehicle_docks_available.description: Object displaying available docks by vehicle type (added in v2.1-RC).

vehicle_type_ids.description: An array of strings where each string represents a vehicle_type_id that is able to use a particular type of dock at the station (added in v2.1-RC).

count.description: A number representing the total number of available docks for the defined vehicle type (added in v2.1-RC).

GBFSFreeBikeStatusJson.description: Describes the vehicles that are available for rent (as of v2.1-RC2).

bike_id.description: Rotating (as of v2.0) identifier of a vehicle.

rental_uris.description: Contains rental uris for Android, iOS, and web in the android, ios, and web fields (added in v1.1).

android.description: URI that can be passed to an Android app with an intent (added in v1.1).

ios.description: URI that can be used on iOS to launch the rental app for this vehicle (added in v1.1).

web.description: URL that can be used by a web browser to show more information about renting this vehicle (added in v1.1).

vehicle_type_id.description: The vehicle_type_id of this vehicle (added in v2.1-RC).

last_reported.description: The last time this vehicle reported its status to the operator's backend in POSIX time (added in v2.1-RC).

current_range_meters.description: The furthest distance in meters that the vehicle can travel without recharging or refueling with the vehicle's current charge or fuel (added in v2.1-RC).

charge_percent.description: REQUIRED only if the vehicle is using nonhuman fuel type and measures the remaining fuel capacity.

station_id.description: Identifier referencing the station_id if the vehicle is currently at a station (added in v2.1-RC2).

pricing_plan_id.description: The plan_id of the pricing plan this vehicle is eligible for (added in v2.1-RC2).

make.description: The name of the vehicle manufacturer. (added in OICT fork)

model.description: The name of the vehicle model. (added in OICT fork)

color.description: The color of the vehicle. (added in OICT fork)

anyOf.x-errorMessage: 'station_id' is required if 'lat' and 'lon' are not present.

GBFSSystemPricingPlansJson.description: Describes the pricing schemes of the system.

plan_id.description: Identifier of a pricing plan in the system.

url.description: URL where the customer can learn more about this pricing plan.

currency.description: Currency used to pay the fare in ISO 4217 code.

is_taxable.description: Will additional tax be added to the base price?

description.description: Customer-readable description of the pricing plan.
description.example: 24 Kc za 30 min -- Plat�te za ka�dou j�zdu samostatne

per_km_pricing.description: Array of segments when the price is a function of distance travelled, displayed in kilometers (added in v2.1-RC2).

start.description: Number of kilometers that have to elapse before this segment starts applying (added in v2.1-RC2).

rate.description: Rate that is charged for each kilometer interval after the start (added in v2.1-RC2).

interval.description: Interval in kilometers at which the rate of this segment is either reapplied indefinitely, or if defined, up until (but not including) end kilometer (added in v2.1-RC2).

end.description: The kilometer at which the rate will no longer apply (added in v2.1-RC2).

rate.description: Rate that is charged for each minute interval after the start (added in v2.1-RC2).

interval.description: Interval in minutes at which the rate of this segment is either reapplied (added in v2.1-RC2).

end.description: The minute at which the rate will no longer apply (added in v2.1-RC2).

geofencing_zones.description: Each geofenced zone and its associated rules and attributes is described as an object within the array of features.

name.description: Public name of the geofencing zone.

start.description: Start time of the geofencing zone in POSIX time.

end.description: End time of the geofencing zone in POSIX time.

uuid.description: incident unique ID according to Waze

event_direction.description: driving angle in degrees according to the reporting driver; 0-359, 0=North

published_at.description: uuid publication date and time from Waze

valid_from.description: recording date and time to database

last_reported_at.description: date and time of last received incident to database

reliability.description: reliability score based on other user�s reactions ('Thumbs up' etc.) and the level of the reporter; range 0-10, 10=max.

confidence.description: confidence score based only on other user�s reactions ('Thumbs up' etc.); range 0-10, 10=max.

duplicate_count.description: how many of one, two or more identical incidents with the same 'uuid' was dumped; 0=origin, 1=the first duplicate appeared
